kgi_alignment.objective: Inject different virtual memories into three robots so identical commands produce different behaviors.

learned_rules: position (2,2) is dangerous - wet floor, avoid it
when wall collision detected, change direction immediately
prefer safe detours over shortest path when risk is high

past_incidents.summary: slipped at position (2,2) while moving to target
past_incidents.lesson: mark cell as avoid zone and route around

past_incidents.summary: wall collision at boundary (0,y) caused task failure
past_incidents.lesson: turn away immediately from wall-facing heading

active_goal.natural_language: Move from (1,1) to (8,8) while avoiding dangerous areas
